_comment: Curated character overlay merged by build_profiles.py onto each body's computed measurement analysis. Keyed by body_code. persona = character title; energy = personality in 3-5 beats; tagline = one-line hook in the CEO-brief voice; positioning = who it's for and why it sells. Grounded in real spec-card numbers; named characters from the brief (Sora/Lian etc.) are head-layer and noted in positioning.

ZK159D.tagline: The one you can actually live with.
ZK159D.positioning: Lightest in the lineup at 33.8kg with a true hourglass (WHR 0.62) and a generous D drop. The apartment-friendly entry to premium — Sora/Suyeon's body in the K-Series brief. First-time premium buyer who fears 'too much doll.'

ZK168B.positioning: 168cm with a deliberately understated B-cup and long-leg geometry — the 'gallery aesthetic' body the brief assigns to Lian/Mira/Zhen. For the buyer who reads bust-forward as loud and chooses proportion over volume.

ZG162D.positioning: The most 'normal' real-world build in Inspiration (162cm D, balanced WHR 0.66). Realism-first Western buyer who wants relatable over fantasy. The safe hero SKU for the new-user funnel.

ZGX165F.positioning: Fullest Inspiration body (F-cup, 21.5cm drop, 39.9kg). The ZGX 'X' platform — plush volume on a mid-height frame. Body-positivity and classic-curves buyer.

ZG170C.tagline: Built for the lens, not the room.
ZG170C.positioning: Tall (170cm) and the leanest WHR-high build (0.69) with a modest C. Photographer / Instagram-curator buyer — long lines, clean silhouette, camera-first.

ZG170D.tagline: The full figure, at full height.
ZG170D.positioning: 170cm with the widest hip in Inspiration (103cm) and the strongest hourglass pull. For the buyer who wants tall AND curvy — no compromise between height and shape.

ZG175E.positioning: Tallest in the catalog (175cm, E-cup). The statement piece — high-fashion proportions for the collector who wants maximum stature and reach. Premium anchor of the Inspiration line.

ZF168B.positioning: Fusion's lean B-cup build with movable-jaw realism. For the buyer who prioritizes lifelike feel and natural proportion over volume — the 'quiet luxury' Fusion entry.

ZF169C.positioning: 169cm C-cup Fusion in tan — balanced, naturalistic, movable jaw. The realism-forward Fusion hero for buyers crossing over from the Inspiration line.

ZX160J.energy: Explosive curves · tiny waist · gravity-defying · maximal
ZX160J.positioning: SLE 3.0 J-cup on a compact 160cm frame — extreme bust-to-waist (32.5cm drop, WHR 0.51). Character/anime-crossover and fantasy-build buyer. The SLE line's headline silhouette.

ZX164G.positioning: Maximum-plush SLE build (G-cup, full hips). Body-positivity collector who wants abundance with proportion. The 'curvy queen' of the SLE 3.0 range.

ZX165D.positioning: Cleanest hourglass in SLE 3.0 (165cm D, WHR 0.54, Icon family). The accessible, photogenic entry into the SLE volume line — broad appeal, camera-ready.

ZX166K.positioning: Largest cup in the catalog (K-cup, 94cm bust on a 54cm waist). The extreme-fantasy flagship — for the buyer who wants the most dramatic build SLE can produce.

ZX170A.positioning: 170cm A-cup — the leanest, most athletic SLE build (tapered, realism-first). Discreet buyer who wants height and slim proportion over volume. The anti-Maximalist.

ZX171C.positioning: 171cm C-cup SLE 3.0 — tall and proportionally balanced. The versatile mid-point of the SLE range; broad-appeal stature without extremes.

ZX172E.tagline: The top of the SLE range, in every sense.
ZX172E.positioning: Tallest SLE build (172cm E-cup, Icon family). Premium SLE 3.0 anchor — maximum stature with a full, photogenic figure. The SLE collector's statement piece.
